title: bus.bead.bench_completed v1
description: A benchmark comparison has completed for a bead — baseline vs treatment metric with optional confidence interval. Lives on its own channel rather than under bus.bead.lifecycle because the payload is structurally richer (numeric metrics + CI) and downstream Forge consumers route it differently from binary pass/fail events. Producer: any bench harness that completes a paired baseline/treatment run keyed by a bead. Consumer: deer-flow Forge bus_consumer.

session_id.description: Bench session correlation id — groups paired baseline/treatment trials and downstream analysis.

bead_id.description: Bead this bench result is attributed to.

baseline_metric.description: Aggregate metric from the baseline (pre-change) condition. Higher-or-lower-is-better is bench-specific; consumers infer from sign of `delta`.

treatment_metric.description: Aggregate metric from the treatment (post-change) condition.

delta.description: treatment_metric - baseline_metric. Sign convention is bench-specific.

ci_lower.description: Lower bound of the confidence interval around `delta`. Optional — omit when CI not computed.

ci_upper.description: Upper bound of the confidence interval around `delta`. Optional.

n.description: Sample size used to compute the metric (e.g. number of paired trials).

passes_threshold.description: Whether the bench result clears the bead's promotion threshold. Forge uses this as the gate signal.

ts.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp of bench completion.
